The code is well-structured, standard, and safe.\n\n- **Scores assigned (malware, obfuscated, risk)?**  \n  All reports assign malware = 0, obfuscated = 0, and low security risk (~0.1). Score of 0 is appropriate.\n\n- **Risk Score:**  \n  The minimal risk (~0.1) is justified, as the code is a safe, read-only interface factory. No vulnerabilities or malicious behaviors are present.\n\n- **Potential Vulnerabilities or Assumptions:**  \n  The reports do not overstate any vulnerabilities; they correctly interpret the code as a standard interface wrapper.\n\n---\n\n### Critical Evaluation:\n\n- **Are any claims about vulnerabilities based on assumptions?**  \n  No. All assessments correctly note the code's purpose and limitations.\n\n- **Are the scores consistent?**  \n  Yes.
